evidence_direction_note: 2026-04-17: Reclassified from does_not_support to non_contributory. The FAIL reflects a substrate gap -- the wiring from the E1 frontal goal representation to hippocampal terrain navigation is not yet implemented. z_goal_norm=0 cannot distinguish 'goal not structured' from 'goal not wired to hippocampal system'. EXQ-328b cannot test MECH-230's hippocampal navigation prediction until that wiring exists. Similarly, SD-012 seeding cannot be evaluated via this experiment since the downstream readout (hippocampal terrain navigation lift) depends on the same missing substrate.
